response.justification: Strong software engineer with proven architecture and design skills, plus direct IDE experience from NI LabWindows work. However, the resume shows minimal recent Java expertise (last substantive Java mention ~6 years ago), no Kotlin experience, and no Spring ecosystem involvement—all critical requirements. Current work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js. Could be viable if Java/Spring proficiency can be verified or if quick ramp-up is acceptable, but technical fit is currently weak.
strengths: Direct IDE internals experience building NI LabWindows/CVI components for engineers
Strong architecture and design fundamentals demonstrated across 15+ years, including microservices, complex systems, and clean code practices
Current tooling/framework work with MCP and developer-focused projects shows continued interest in developer experience
concerns: Recent work (2021–present) is TypeScript/Node.js; Java last demonstrated meaningfully ~6 years ago at Altom
No mention of Kotlin, Spring, Spring Boot, Hibernate, Quarkus, or any enterprise Java frameworks—core role requirements
Career shows language diversity but suggests pattern of shifting away from JVM ecosystem toward web and scripting languages

key_factors.factor: General engineering maturity and architecture skill
